message:
feat(analysis): add DriftThresholds struct and document search bonuses

bd-24mj.4: Add DriftThresholds with configurable percentage thresholds
for density growth, blocked increase, actionable decrease, structure
change, and ranking change. Defaults match current hard-coded values.

bd-24mj.5: Replace inline magic numbers in text_relevance() with named
constants (TITLE_MATCH_BONUS, ID_MATCH_BONUS, TOKEN_COVERAGE_WEIGHT)
and add rationale comments. These are already partially configurable
via --search-weights and --search-preset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
